title: [blackcat] L1 Momentum Crossover Pro
author: blackcat1402
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: [blackcat] L1 Momentum Crossover Pro by blackcat1402.
█ OVERVIEW Momentum Crossover Pro (MCP) is an advanced oscillator-based trading indicator that identifies high-probability entry and exit points through momentum crossover analysis.
It features a DIF oscillator with dynamic signal line, multi-zone detection, and real-time status monitoring with visual alerts.
█ CONCEPTS This indicator utilizes a triple-layer momentum analysis system to identify optimal trading conditions.
